items.summary: Upcoming talk at Deschutes Tech Guild: "Your Digital Twin and Rational Choice."
Forthcoming: "A Compositional Semantics for Venn Diagrams" (Linguistics and Philosophy).
LogicSkills: A Structured Benchmark for Formal Reasoning in Large Language Models (draft on arXiv).
"A formal semantics for Wittgenstein's builder language," Revista Portuguesa de Filosofia 81 (4): 1195–1210 (2025).
Logic questions included in Humanity's Last Exam, an expert-level academic benchmark for AI (Nature).
